title: Anti-Surveillance Toolkit (7-Layer Guide)
content: 7 layers: Hardware (Purism/GrapheneOS), Network (ProtonVPN/Tor), Comms (Signal/ProtonMail), Data (Veracrypt/BleachBit), Behavior (opsec/compartmentalization), Legal (rights/gag orders), Community (mesh/offline). Cost: $0. 854 lines. Zero-cost implementation.
